---
title: "Palmer Penguins Report"
format: html
params:
  data_dir: "data"
  output_dir: "output"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
penguins <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "clean_penguins.rds"))
summary_df <- read.csv(file.path(params$output_dir, "species_summary.csv"))
```

## Overview

This report was generated by an **daggle** pipeline from the
[Palmer Penguins](https://allisonhorst.github.io/palmerpenguins/) dataset.

The cleaned dataset contains **`r nrow(penguins)`** observations across
**`r length(unique(penguins$species))`** species, collected from
**`r length(unique(penguins$island))`** islands.

## Species Summary

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(summary_df, col.names = c("Species", "N", "Bill Length (mm)",
  "Bill Depth (mm)", "Flipper Length (mm)", "Body Mass (g)"))
```

## Bill Dimensions

Bill length and bill depth show distinct clustering by species, with Gentoo
penguins having longer but shallower bills compared to Adelie and Chinstrap.

![Bill length vs depth by species](`r file.path(params$output_dir, "bill_scatter.png")`)

## Flipper Length

Gentoo penguins have notably longer flippers than the other two species.

![Flipper length distribution by species](`r file.path(params$output_dir, "flipper_boxplot.png")`)

## Pipeline Info

Generated by `daggle` on `r Sys.time()`.
